sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67707" key="mikro/genus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρό-γενυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υος</itype>, <sense id="n67707.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with small jaws</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
